name: yandex-wordstat
description: Yandex Wordstat search demand via the mcp-yandex-wordstat npm server: keyword frequency, related queries, seasonality and regional demand. Requires Node.js 18+ and a Yandex Cloud API key (prompted on enable).

api_key.title: Yandex Cloud API key
api_key.description: Search API v2 key (same kind as for YandexGPT) — see github.com/askads/mcp-yandex-wordstat for how to get one

folder_id.title: Yandex Cloud folder ID
folder_id.description: Folder the API key belongs to (cloud console → folder ID)
